answers.answer: D) logger.error({ err: error, correlationId: req.correlationId }, "Failed to process request"); (using pino with correlation ID). Reason: This correctly applies BOTH corrections from earlier: (1) uses pino logger instead of console.log, AND (2) includes correlation ID. Option A uses console.error (wrong logger). Option B uses pino but missing correlation ID. Option C uses console.log (wrong logger). Only D applies both corrections.
